summary: Iteration 50 testing complete. Verified Pricing Hub changes (no add buttons, flat list, tier start/end dates). Programs section shows clean cards. Upcoming section shows full overlay. Found 1 bug: Programs section includes is_upcoming=true programs.

ui_bugs.issue: Programs section displays programs with is_upcoming=true (like Quad Layer Healing). Should filter out upcoming programs since they're shown in UpcomingProgramsSection.
ui_bugs.fix_suggestion: Line 227-228: Add filter after fetch: setPrograms(r.data.filter(p => !p.is_upcoming))

action_items: Fix ProgramsSection.jsx to filter out is_upcoming=true programs from the Programs section
critical_code_review_comments: ProgramsSection.jsx fetches all visible programs but should exclude is_upcoming=true programs to avoid duplication with UpcomingProgramsSection

success_rate.frontend: 95% - All features verified except Programs section filter bug

seed_data_creation: Tested tier date save: Atomic Musculoskeletal Regen Program tier 0 now has start='March 1, 2026', end='March 31, 2026'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 50 tested new Pricing Hub layout and Programs section changes. Key findings: (1) Pricing Hub has no Add Program/Session buttons, single flat list, tier rows have start/end date inputs, subtitle mentions 'Create programs in Programs tab'. (2) Programs section title is 'Programs', cards are clean (no dates/countdown/pricing), only 'Know More' button. (3) Upcoming section shows full overlay with tier-aware dates, countdown, timing, pricing, and enroll button. (4) BUG: Programs section includes is_upcoming=true programs (Quad Layer Healing). (5) Tier-aware dates cannot be fully tested because only upcoming program (Quad Layer Healing) has is_flagship=false and no tiers. To test tier-aware dates, need a program with is_upcoming=true AND is_flagship=true AND duration_tiers.

verified: Section title is 'Programs' (not 'Flagship Programs')
Cards show: image, mode badges, title, description, 'Know More' button
Cards do NOT show: dates, countdown, pricing, tier selector
Cards show dates (Start/End), timing with timezone conversion
Countdown timer visible and functional
Duration badge (e.g., '21 Days')
Exclusive offer badge ('LIMITED TIME OFFER')
Pricing with strikethrough for offers
'Know More' and 'Enroll Now' buttons
No 'Add Program' button visible
No 'Add Session' button visible
Programs table shows all programs in single list (no Upcoming/Flagship segregation)
Sessions table shows all sessions in single list
Each tier row has 'Start' and 'End' date input fields
15 tier rows found with date inputs
Tier dates can be saved and persist to database
Subtitle says 'Edit all prices, offers, and durations. Create programs in the Programs tab.'
Save All button at top and bottom
Toast message 'All pricing saved!' appears on save
Tier dates persist correctly after save
DurationTier model has start_date: str = '' field
DurationTier model has end_date: str = '' field
Code implemented in UpcomingProgramsSection.jsx (lines 189-191)
Cannot fully test because Quad Layer Healing (only upcoming) has no tiers
tier_aware_dates.note: Feature code exists and is correct. Full testing requires program with is_upcoming=true AND duration_tiers.length > 0

bug_to_fix.reason: Programs section should only show non-upcoming programs since upcoming programs are displayed in UpcomingProgramsSection
